summary: Classified 10 open PRs from the hydrated preflight artifact as independent inventory items or security-routed items. Four validator-identified security-sensitive targets are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions; unrelated non-security PRs remain independent. No shared canonical was invented and no mutating close/merge/fix action was planned.
